name: Asleep
summary: Prone and unconscious; another can wake with an action; damage usually removes it.

name: Blinded
summary: Cannot see (totally obscured); attacks vs Defense/Agility gain 1 boon; sight Perception fails; Speed becomes 2 unless lower.

name: Charmed
summary: Sees the source as a trusted friend and ally; cannot target that creature with attacks.

name: Compelled
summary: Cannot act or move; each fast turn the controller forces a move up to Speed or an action.

name: Deafened
summary: Cannot hear; listen Perception challenges automatically fail.

name: Defenseless
summary: Defense 5; cannot use actions; attribute challenge rolls fail; can still perceive and make Perception rolls.

name: Diseased
summary: All attack and challenge rolls with 1 bane.

name: Fatigued
summary: All attack and challenge rolls with 1 bane.

name: Frightened
summary: 2019 Revised: Attack and challenge rolls with 1 bane, or 3 banes while you can see the source. (No longer restricts when you can act.)

name: Grabbed
summary: If Size <= grabber: cannot move away until removed. If larger: grabber may move with you or end the grab when you move.

name: Immobilized
summary: Speed 0; no Speed bonuses; attacks against you gain 1 boon.

name: Impaired
summary: All attack and challenge rolls with 1 bane.

name: Poisoned
summary: All attack and challenge rolls with 1 bane.

name: Prone
summary: On the ground; crawl or stand; Str/Agi rolls 1 bane; melee reach attacks 1 boon, ranged vs Defense 1 bane.

name: Slowed
summary: Only slow turns; Speed halved; no Speed increases.

name: Stunned
summary: Cannot move or use actions; challenge rolls auto-fail; attacks against you gain 1 boon.

name: Surprised
summary: Cannot use actions or move; challenge rolls auto-fail.

name: Unconscious
summary: Cannot act, move, or perceive; Defense 5; challenge rolls fail.
